nodes.title: Outreach
Project Goal Contribute to the sustained increase in incomes of rural households by improving the competitiveness of the farming operations
Development Objective Improve the competitiveness of the famers through a value chain approach covering production, value addition of high value niche crops, spices and horticulture produce
Outcome Outcome 1: Expansion and improved performance of Rural Producers' Organizations (FPOs)
Output Output 1.1: Scaling up collectivization
Outcome Outcome 2: Enhanced productivity and production (niche and horticultural crops)
Output Output 2.1: GAP training
Output Output 2.2: Access to inputs/technology packages
Output Output 2.3: Water management systems established
Output Output 2.4: Nurseries established
Outcome Outcome 3: Improved price realization of Agri and allied farmers
Output Output 3.1: Enterprise promotion
Output Output 3.2: Market promotion
Output Output 3.3: Incubation and start-up
Outcome Outcome 4: Improved resilience of vulnerable groups
Output Output: 4.1: Pastoralists support
Output Output 4.2: Support to other vulnerable groups
Outcome Outcome 5: Project Management systems strengthened
Output Output 5.1: Policy engagement
Output Output 5.2: Staff training of staff of Agri and allied Directorates
